props.name: content
props.description: The content of the tooltip. Accepts plain text or rich content.

props.name: hAlign
props.description: Horizontal alignment of the tooltip relative to the child element.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the tooltip. Must use 'px' unit.

props.name: position
props.description: Position of the tooltip with respect to the child element.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

slots.name: content
